Title: BNI Escrow, RDL and RDF Onboarding
Content:

MO

PIC

PM

P2P Escrow and RDL Guideline

[Aug 2025] P2P Escrow and RDL Guideline

Eligibility

Escrow

Entity Type

Can Apply for BNI Escrow?

Indonesian Entity (PT/CV/Yayasan)

✅

Indonesian Entity (Perseroan perorangan/PP)

❌

Indonesian Individual

❌

Foreign Entity

❌

Foreign Individual

❌

RDL*

Entity Type

Can Apply for BNI RDL?

Indonesian Entity (PT/CV/Yayasan)

✅

*RDLs need to be registered under specific P2P Lending

Onboarding Steps

Escrow

No escrow account yet

Merchants who do not yet have a bank account can open at their respective BNI Branch. Instamoney also provides recommended BNI branches for account opening. Below is the contact information for the BNI Jakarta Tempo Scan Branch recommended by Instamoney Ibu Saron and phone number +62 859-2606-6042

Already has escrow account

Category

Action

Process Owner

Merchant applies for BNI Escrow

Merchant submit an application from Escrow Form that has been provided by Account Manager

Merchant

MO Check on #im-apl channel

MO will check on Slack channel in #im-apl to see what merchant request for between activating Escrow or RDL account

MO

MO will give emoji according to emoji description

MO

Update tracker

Fill out tracker Instamoney BNI/RDL/RDF Tracker

MO

MO check Request PoA & Conf. Letter tab sheet

MO check the tab sheet under Request PoA & Conf. Letter whether AM already input merchant details for PKS number and PKS date on column F and G

Also check for BNI and Instamoney pricing on column O, P and Q

Notes : This step to ensure whether merchants already have confirmation letters or not. if in the Request PoA & Conf. Letter tab sheet there’s no update detail or Sales team has not fulfilled yet please hold sending the email notification and MO will follow up to Zeson Law Satya Kalama Nindya Asmara to provide the details in #im-apl

MO

MO Sending Email Notification

MO will send the email notification to merchants that contains all requirements for the Escrow migration from Offline to Online.

Note:

MO also to add date in column Form Sent To Customer in column K

MO ensure in body email to add the BNI Direct, BNI VA and POA to get validation from merchant BNI branch

MO

Merchant replied MO email with attaching the requirements

Merchant will inform MO via email that they already provide the all required requirements

Merchant

BNI PoA Form and Confirmation Letter

For BNI PoA form and Confirmation Letter, after merchants provide the both softcopy and hardcopy, MO will help send those two forms to signed by Mikiko.

Signed BNI PoA Form

SIgned Confirmation Letter

MO

MO Sending the Hardcopy to merchant

After check and all documents are complete including BNI PoA form and Confirmation letter get signed, MO will send the hardcopy to the merchant so they can validate the form at their respective BNI branch .

MO

MO Validate BNI Direct and BNI API P2PL for Instamoney

MO needs to send the BNI Direct and BNI API P2PL documents to the BNI Jakarta Tempo Scan Branch for form validation.

MO

MO send all required BNI Form to BNI TBS

After all documents from the merchant and the BNI Jakarta Tempo Scan Branch have been validated. MO send an email to BNI TBS for the next step of migrate the merchant BNI account from offline to online.

Notes : Ensure in API P2PL form for checklist the Pendaftaran Sub Mitra and fulfilled with merchant Sub Mitra (all the letter should be on UPPERCASE)

The email format will be :

For Escrow Account :

Subject : [Instamoney] Pendaftaran ESCROW (Tanggal) - (Nama Merchant)

Dear BNI Team,

Mohon bantuannya terkait dengan pengajuan akun escrow. Dengan detail sebagai berikut:

  • Nama Rekening:

  • Submitra :

  • No Rekening :

Telah dilampirkan formulir yang dibutuhkan:

  • BNI Direct Maintenance (Syaftraco)

  • BNI API P2PL (Syaftraco)

  • Surat Kuasa (antara Syaftraco dan P2P)

  • BNI SNAP OGP (Syaftraco)

  • Surat Konfirmasi

  • Link gdrive

Masing masing dari formulir sudah dikirimkan pada cabang dan sudah divalidasi oleh cabang terkait.

Detail kebutuhan penambahan CID VA P2P (Submitra), sebagai berikut detail untuk P2P :

  • Nama :

  • e-mail :

  • No. Telp :

Detail kebutuhan pembuatan dashboard portal VA. 2 alamat email perorangan untuk kebutuhan pengiriman credential

  • Instamoney email : armel@instamoney.co

  • P2P email :

*Mohon bantuannya juga untuk setting di bawah ini :

  • Whitelist connector link https://bni-va-connector.xendit.co/payment

  • Setting callback debit dan credit

  • Serta setting promote account

Atas perhatian dan kerjasamanya kami ucapkan terima kasih

Notes : MO will check and send the required documents to BNI TBS along with attaching documents. MO should send the documents using Google Drive link

MO

MO got feedback from BNI

BNI team (TBS) replies MO’s email with BNI account credential (account number, account name with CID)

AM

Helpdesk team from BNI will email with Secret Key

BNI

MO update the date in tracker on column Y

MO

MO confirm to finops

MO will confirm to finops team by workflow in channel #bank-ops

and confirm whether the merchant account number is already in BNIDIrect PT Syaftraco or not.

MO

FinOps will confirm back to us

FinOps

MO update the date in tracker on column Q

MO

MO will confirm to the related team (escrow)

After getting confirmation from Finops, MO will update by posting on slack.

For Escrow account will update on slack channel #product-issues.

Notes : For BID and merchant business email we could using the document Customers Live in IM as reference but also still need asking AM to make sure the correct BID and business email. Please make sure VA Limit and Callback Stuff have been set by BNI before we ask the Escrow team for testing.

MO inform CID & Secret Key to Escrow Team

The Escrow Team will ask MO to provide CID & Secret Key. And MO will inform CID & Secret Key to Escrow Team by email.

Email to : Will Heryanto <williamheryanto@instamoney.co>

Escrow team give feedback

Escrow team will give an update on a slack thread. Before we proceed with testing using Retool, they will provide the following information :

  • Escrow team will provide confirmation once the setup on their side has been completed and

  • They will provide the CID information.

Escrow Team

MO testing Escrow

After receiving confirmation from the Escrow Team, MO will proceed with testing using Retool.

https://retool.tidnex.com/apps/e190e358-4fdd-11f0-8d11-932d4a365089/Escrow/Escrow%20LIVE%20Test/page1

MO should fill below

  1. Escrow Account Number

  2. Business ID

  3. CID Internal

  4. CID Direct

MO

MO update the tracker

MO updated the status on column K as Activated

MO

MO inform to CPS/Sales

Once activated, MO will inform CPS/Sales that the Escrow is ready for use to #im-apl

MO

RDL

No RDL account yet

Merchants who do not yet have a bank account can open at their respective BNI Branch. Instamoney also provides recommended BNI branches for account opening. Below is the contact information for the BNI Jakarta Tempo Scan Branch recommended by Instamoney Ibu Saron and phone number +62 859-2606-6042

Already has RDL account

Merchant applies for BNI Escrow/RDL

Merchant submit an application from RDL Form that has been provided by Account Manager

Merchant

MO Check on #im-apl channel

MO will check on Slack channel in #im-apl to see what merchant request for between activating Escrow account or RDL account

MO

MO will give emoji according to emoji description

MO

Update the Tracker

Fill out tracker Instamoney BNI/RDL/RDF Tracker

Note:

MO also to add which branch will proceed the account opening

MO

MO Sending Email Notification

MO will send the email notification to merchants that contains all requirements for the RDL migration from Offline to Online.

Note:

MO also to add change status in column K with Pending due to Customer

MO

Merchant replied MO email with attaching the requirements

Merchant will inform MO via email that they already provide all required requirements. Please ensure that the merchant has validated the BNI Direct and PoA forms at their respective BNI Branch.

Merchant

MO Validate BNI Direct and BNI API P2PL to BNI Jakarta Tempo Scan Branch

MO needs to send the BNI Direct and BNI API P2PL documents to the BNI Jakarta Tempo Scan Branch for form validation.

MO

MO send all required BNI Form to BNI TBS

After all documents from the merchant and the BNI Jakarta Tempo Scan Branch have been validated. MO send an email to BNI TBS for the next step of migrate the merchant BNI account from offline to online.

Notes : Ensure in API P2PL form for checklist the Pendaftaran Sub Mitra and fulfilled with merchant Sub Mitra (all the letter should be on UPPERCASE)

The email format will be :

For RDL Account :

Subject : [Instamoney] Pendaftaran RDL (Tanggal) - (Lender) (Sub Mitra)

Dear BNI Team,

Semoga selalu dalam keadaan sehat.

Bersama ini kami bermaksud mendaftarkan migrasi RDL berikut, dari RDL offline ke RDL online:

Nama P2P (Sub Mitra) - Lender (No Rekening)

Untuk itu terlampir kami sampaikan:

  • Form Maintenance P2PL PT Syaftraco

  • Aplikasi Maintenance BNIDirect PT Syaftraco

  • Aplikasi Maintenance BNIDirect Lender

  • Surat Konfirmasi P2P dan PT Syaftraco

  • Surat Kuasa dari masing-masing Lender

Note:

  • Berikut link gdrive (Lender) untuk dokumen di atas.

  • Serta mohon bantuannya untuk dapat setting callback debit dan credit masing-masing rekening

Atas perhatian dan kerjasamanya kami ucapkan terima kasih

Notes : MO will check and send the required documents to BNI TBS along with attaching documents. MO should send the documents using Google Drive link

MO send all required BNI Form to BNI TBS

MO updated the date on column O and Status on column K

MO

MO got feedback from BNI

BNI team (TBS) replies MO’s email and inform that merchant BNI account already opened

BNI Branch

MO update tracker

MO update the date in tracker on column P

MO

MO confirm to finops

MO will confirm to FinOps team by workflow in channel #bank-ops

and confirm whether the merchant account number is already in BNIDIrect PT Syaftraco or not.

MO

FinOps will confirm back to us

FinOps

MO update the date in tracker on column Q

MO

MO testing Escrow

After receiving confirmation from the FinOpsTeam, MO will proceed with testing using Retool.

https://retool.tidnex.com/tree/williamheryanto%2Fpatch-23b7/apps/Escrow/RDL%20Offline%20Test

MO should fill below

  • Business ID

  • Company ID

MO update the tracker

MO updated the status on column K as Activated

MO

MO inform to CPS/Sales

Once activated, MO will inform CPS/Sales that the Escrow is ready for use to #im-apl

MO

RDF

Similar to RDL but form submission using this https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScDgM-uGxdvlce3Ko0woIStwndCrZAniNM4VxO3OnMO-iBKCA/viewform

For RDF we need send this Statement Letter when submitting the form to TBSCopy of Statement Letter RDF Application Xendit __ Instamoney.pdf + Xendit contract.pdf
